HGSS.484.0000:
This is my trusted pal, POLIWRATH.\f
I wonder if it will become a Frog
Pokémon someday.
HGSS.484.0002:
Oh, my!
Were you staring at me?\f
Seeing me come out of the Game Corner
with a whole pile of Coins...\r
And grinning to myself?\r
You were, weren’t you?
HGSS.484.0003:
GRIMER started to appear recently.
You see the pond in front of the house?\f
It has GRIMER, too.
I wonder where they came from.\f
Sigh...
HGSS.484.0004:
Ha ha! This Gym is great!
It’s full of strong Trainers!
HGSS.484.0005:
I’ll tell you a secret!\f
The Celadon Condominiums have some
places you can only reach by taking the\r
elevator on the second floor!
HGSS.484.0006:
The restaurant there is having an
eating contest.\f
I heard that we have a great
contestant from the Sinnoh region\r
this year.
HGSS.484.0007:
The Celadon Department Store offers
the widest range of items!\r
You can buy anything you want!\f
...Do I sound like their
sales representative?
HGSS.484.0008:
I love this kind of place where
there are many buildings!\f
I heard Johto also has a city called
Goldenrod that has many\r
tall buildings.\r
I would love to visit there sometime.
HGSS.484.0009:
Erika: Hi, Jasmine. I heard Whitney from
Goldenrod Gym said you were too\r
plain and should look more fancy.\r
Is that true?\f
HGSS.484.0010:
Jasmine: Yes...\f
I’m thinking maybe I should
participate in this Contest in Sinnoh\r
to try and be more vibrant...\f
HGSS.484.0012:
Jasmine: I couldn’t bring myself to
go to the Contest.\f
HGSS.484.0013:
Erika: Oh, I see...\f
Then why don’t you try putting on
something especially gorgeous?\f
HGSS.484.0014:
Jasmine: Ah, yes!
Maybe I can bring myself to\r
enter the Contest!\f
HGSS.484.0015:
Erika: How about a fancy, light blue
outfit with a cape over it?\f
HGSS.484.0017:
Erika: I see.
You think Clair from Blackthorn is a\r
little embarrassing...\r
I’m just taking notes.\f
HGSS.484.0018:
Jasmine: Oh, no!
Erika, that’s not what I meant!
HGSS.484.0019:
Erika: Hi, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Would you like to
exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.484.0021:
Erika: I am often free in the morning
on Sunday.\f
Call me around then.
HGSS.484.0023:
Erika: Would you like to
exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.484.0024:
Erika: Hi!
Good to see you here.\f
How would you like to take a picture
with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.484.0025: Erika: Try and look cool now.\f
HGSS.484.0026:
Erika: Good job.
It looks good!
HGSS.484.0028:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.484.0029: Jasmine: Amphy is well thanks to you.

Leader: Erika\r
The Nature-Loving Princess!

Find what you need at the

from status-reduction moves\r
during battle.\f
